---
title: "main-functions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{main-functions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(projectr)
```

```{r}
style_gt_journal(table, title, subtitle, percent)
# Applies consistent journal-theme styling to a gt table. 
# The function adds a title and optional subtitle, formats selected columns 
# as percentages, applies optional color gradients, and standardizes table 
# headers, borders, row striping, padding, and dashboard theme colors.
```

```{r}
plot_country_dist(data, country, order)
# Creates a journal-themed bar chart showing the distribution of plastic 
# types collected in a selected country. The function filters the data by 
# country, summarizes plastic type totals, orders the bars according to the 
# selected sorting direction, and applies consistent dashboard styling.
```

```{r}
summarize_plastics(data, type)
# Summarizes plastic type composition across years. The function calculates 
# each plastic type’s 2020 proportion, change in proportion from the previous 
# year, year-over-year change in total amount, or all summary measures, 
# depending on the selected type argument.
```
